REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. COMPLAINT STATES FACTS TO SUPPORT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS REGARDING THE DESPUTE THAT HAS ARISEN OVER THE PROPERTY OWNERSHIP. WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS OR IS NOT THE OWNER OF THE ENTIRE PARCEL IS AN ISSUE OF FACT TO BE DETERMINED BY THE TRIER OF FACT IN THIS ACTION. IT IS NOT PROPERLY SUBJECT OF A DEMURRER. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Appearances via Zoom: Thomas LaLanne of the Law Offices of Thomas J. LaLanne (415.434.1122) for defendants and moving parties; Matthew Delbridge of Steyer Lowenthal (415.421.3400) for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. Complete verified responses to be provided within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $2,200. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Edward Smith, Esq. of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas Alvarez Smith LLP, Tel. 415.421.3400, Email: esmith@steyerlaw.com, for Plaintiff;
Thomas LaLanne, Esq. of Law Offices of Thomas LaLanne, Tel. 415.434.1122, Email: tomalalannelaw.com, for Defendants Ocean Avenue Real Estate LCC and Tony Garnicki.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LCC, TONY GARNICKI'S Motion For Protective Order.

Defendants Ocean Avenue Real Estate Fund, LCC and Tony Garnicki DO NOT stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the motion is continued to September 28, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501, the Real Property/Housing Court.

Judge Pro Tem Borrowman is to prepare a report and recommendation.

DEFENDANT OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LCC, TONY GARNICKI DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer.
